description_long: This is a large commercial cargo airplane painted in the FedEx livery, featuring a predominantly white fuselage with prominent purple and orange branding. The aircraft has a wide, cylindrical body with a streamlined nose and a cockpit located at the front. It is equipped with three jet engines: two mounted under the wings and one integrated into the base of the vertical stabilizer at the tail. The wings are swept back and mounted low on the fuselage, with no visible winglets. The tail section features a T-tail configuration, with a large vertical stabilizer and a horizontal stabilizer mounted at the top. The landing gear is not visible in the images, suggesting it is likely retractable and currently stowed.
description: A large FedEx cargo airplane with a white fuselage, purple tail, and three jet engines, featuring swept low-mounted wings and a T-tail.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full FedEx branding, the three-engine configuration, and the swept low-mounted wings.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the T-tail, the central tail-mounted engine, and the full span of the wings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with FedEx branding, showing the right-side engines and wing structure.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the cockpit windows, nose profile, and the underwing engines.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with swept wings and no visible winglets; moderate dihedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Three jet engines: two underwing and one tail-mounted.
attribute_tail_design: T-tail configuration with a single vertical stabilizer and high-mounted horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear (not visible, inferred from typical configuration).
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows, typical of large commercial aircraft.
